metadata.description: A metacognitive co-developer marketplace - modular AI plugins for ground-truth establishment, hypothesis generation, creative synthesis, and self-guided context engineering on Windows

plugins.name: trace
plugins.description: Metacognitive controller - applies smallest sufficient intervention for routing and supervision

plugins.name: lever
plugins.description: Evaluator and escalation authority - owns commitments, pivots, and reopen rules

plugins.name: residue
plugins.description: Suspicious-surface lens library - investigative interventions for anomalous signals

plugins.name: primitives
plugins.description: Smallest reusable interventions - metacognitive and reasoning primitives

plugins.name: operators
plugins.description: Reusable operator classes - bounded local transformations and evaluations

plugins.name: forensics
plugins.description: Ground-truth establishment family - project mapping, defragmentation, anomaly disambiguation

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Build/change family - development, coding, testing, and refactor pipelines

plugins.name: inquiry
plugins.description: Investigation family - research, hypothesis generation, data analysis, formalization

plugins.name: conduit
plugins.description: Documentation and synthesis family - documentation, scholarly writing, handoff synthesis
